name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of core Java 8 concepts, syntax, collections, concurrency and common libraries for developers.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering JVM internals, multithreading, generics and performance for experienced engineers.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace behavior, including how a person relates to others, their thinking style and feelings, useful for roles requiring stakeholder collaboration and leadership.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Assesses a broad set of transferable workplace competencies and behaviors used to benchmark talent across roles and geographies.

name: Verify G+ Numerical Reasoning
description: Adaptive numerical reasoning test measuring the ability to interpret data in tables and graphs and make logical deductions.

name: Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios to assess judgment, decision making and behavioral tendencies including working with stakeholders.
